title: lithocarpus gougerotae
intro: Lithocarpus gougerotae, also known as Gougerot's tanbark oak, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family Fagaceae. The medicinal properties of Lithocarpus gougerotae include its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi, making it useful in treating various infections. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lithocarpus gougerotae can be made into a tea, tincture, or extract, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
